name: Freeze Blade
description: Freeze Blade is a feline ice skater who is one of the SWAP Force Skylanders in Skylanders: Swap Force. He is of the Water element.
biography: When he was young, Freeze Blade's family moved from the Frozen Wastelands of Vesh to the Great Lava Lakes. As it turned out, this was a very difficult adjustment for Freeze Blade. Not only was he the sole one of his kind, it was also incredibly hot and there was no ice to skate on whatsoever. But over the years, he learned to fit in with the other fire-like creatures and even discovered he had a magical ability to ice skate on any surface... even bubbling lava. One day, while out setting a new frozen lava speed record, he came across Blast Zone, who had just been ambushed by some nasty Spell Punks. After Freeze Blade stepped in to defend him, Blast Zone was so impressed by his skill in battle that he introduced him to Master Eon, who invited him to join the Skylanders.
personality: Freeze Blade slides into action without a thought of his own personal safety. He's always on the move, not one to stay in one place for long. He is known for making friends easily. Bullies, however, leave him cold.

story.content: Freeze Blade was originally conceived as a blue-skinned Kangarat with icy hair, an animal's snout, and an icy tail. His weapon was a triple-bladed disk attached to a long, whip-like rope. Alternate concepts depict him with a unicorn horn, a scarf, or a magelike hood.

Freeze Blade slides into action without a thought of his own personal safety. He's always on the move, not one to stay in one place for long. He is known for making friends easily. Bullies, however, leave him cold.

When he was young, Freeze Blade's family moved from the Frozen Wastelands of Vesh to the Great Lava Lakes. As it turned out, this was a very difficult adjustment for Freeze Blade. Not only was he the sole one of his kind, it was also incredibly hot and there was no ice to skate on whatsoever. But over the years, he learned to fit in with the other fire-like creatures and even discovered he had a magical ability to ice skate on any surface... even bubbling lava. One day, while out setting a new frozen lava speed record, he came across Blast Zone, who had just been ambushed by some nasty Spell Punks. After Freeze Blade stepped in to defend him, Blast Zone was so impressed by his skill in battle that he introduced him to Master Eon, who invited him to join the Skylanders.

content: Ooh, a cool place to chill out!
Chill out, Night Shift. I got this. He can get a litte cranky.
See? That's why I like Night Shift. I mean, who talks like that anymore? He's so old-school.
But sometimes I think he's just taken one too many shots to the head-ski. Watch this.

trivia: Freeze Blade is one of many SWAP Force Skylanders that don't have pupils, the others include Trap Shadow, Stink Bomb, Free Ranger, and Night Shift. It is unknown whether his goggles are transparent or not.
He is the third Water Skylander with ice powers while Slam Bam is the first and Chill is the second. This was then followed by King Pen, who became the fourth one.
In early trailers of Skylanders Swap Force, Freeze Blade's mask is blue instead of dark purple.
Freeze Blade appeared in several beginning trailers for Swap Force, yet he was only released at a later date.
Freeze Blade might be ambidextrous, since even though he holds his chakram in his right hand, in Night Shift's Short Cut, he is able to tap the bell with the hammer using his left hand.
Freeze Blade's battle cry, 'Licensed to chill!' is similar to Drill Sergeant's catchphrase 'Licensed to Drill'.
He is currently the only SWAP Force Skylander to skate. However, Roller Brawl also skates, but in a different way since she uses roller blades.
He and Chill Bill share the following qualities: Both are Water-elemental and both possess ice-based attacks.
In Trap Team, when he performs 'Frostcicle', enemies do not appear to be encased in ice, but do wind up frozen for a few seconds. The same goes for his second upper path, 'Ice Sculptor.'
He is the only Water Skylander originally from Swap Force who has no primary traits originally from the scrapped Skylander, Krayken.

Freeze Blade has multiple similarities to Tundra Man from Mega Man 11. Both are ice manipulators that have ice coating their bodies and even icy hair, primarily move through ice skating, and have the ability to move at high speeds.

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Freeze Blade (Keeping It Cool)
Skylanders Swap Force - Freeze Blade Soul Gem Preview (Keeping It Cool)
Meet the SWAP Force Freeze Blade

gameplay: Freeze Blade slides into action without a thought of his own personal safety. He's always on the move, not one to stay in one place for long. Known for his magical ability to ice skate on any surface, including lava, he utilizes icy chakrams for ranged combat and his unique skating abilities for high mobility. In Skylanders: Ring of Heroes, he serves as an attacker who can inflict the Freeze Effect on enemies and deal damage to frozen targets.

basic.name: Chakram Throw
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to throw an icy chakram.

basic.name: Speedy Skate
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to dash forward a short distance and damage enemies in the way.

basic_upgrades.name: Frostcicle
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to fire a shard of ice that freezes enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Icicles
basic_upgrades.content: Chakram gains a new layer of ice, making attacks do increased damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Frigid Whirl
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 1 to charge the chakram, then release to throw it.

basic_upgrades.name: Ice Trail
basic_upgrades.content: Dashing leaves behind a trail of ice that slows enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Glacial Coat
basic_upgrades.content: Armor increased. As tough as a glacier!

basic_upgrades.name: Bladed Butterfly
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 2 to perform a fancy skating trick that damages all enemies nearby.

soulgems.name: Winter Chakram
soulgems.content: Chakram attacks have increased critical hit chance and do extra frost damage.

soulgems.name: Iceberg Endurance
soulgems.content: Dashing does increased damage and does not stop when attacked.

abilities.name: Shaved Ice
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge the chakram, release to throw the chakram and shoot ice in every direction.

abilities.name: Whiteout
abilities.content: Ice projectiles from Shaved Ice do increased damage.

abilities.name: Oh Snow!
abilities.content: Hold Attack 3 to charge Frostcicle, release to freeze an entire area.

abilities.name: Ice To Meet You
abilities.content: Frostcicle and Oh Snow! Do increased damage.

abilities.name: Flash Freeze
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 to dash, dashing will now leave behind an ice trail that damages enemies.

abilities.name: Nice Ice
abilities.content: Flash Freeze does increased damage. A nasty case of freezer burn!

abilities.name: Penalty Frost
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 to knock back an enemy, wherever the knocked back enemy lands will cause a large freezing explosion.

abilities.name: Iced Skates
abilities.content: Penalty Frost does increased damage. Don't worry, this is not a typical sports penalty.
